tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: We can't go to the park — it's raining cats and dogs! What does this mean?
options: A) Animals are falling from the sky.
B) It is raining very heavily.
C) There are cats and dogs in the park.

items.stem: The new boy told a joke to break the ice. What does this mean?
options: A) He broke something made of ice.
B) He wanted everyone to feel cold.
C) He wanted to start a friendly conversation.

items.stem: Don't worry about the test — it's a piece of cake! What does this mean?
options: A) The teacher will bring cake.

items.stem: Tom is feeling under the weather today, so he's staying in bed. What does this mean?
options: B) He doesn't like the weather.
C) He is hiding from the rain.

items.stem: Oh no, I let the cat out of the bag about the surprise party! What does this mean?
options: C) I accidentally told the secret.

items.stem: I have a big exam tomorrow, so I need to hit the books tonight. What does this mean?
options: A) I need to throw my books away.
B) I need to study hard.
C) I need to buy new books.
